creator: tomek@cedro.info
text: Thank you Jan for quick response. All tests on the provided page seems to pass. I have the camera preview and I can see myself. I have microphone detected and the bar is jumping as I speak. Locally it works fine. The problem with 76.0 is that both other side cannot receive my audio-video and I cannot receive their audio-video. This seems some sort of regression since 75.0 all works fine on exact the same machine and setup. I have tested on different platforms and the problem is exactly the same, while there is no problem on 75.0.
